name: Young-donor microbiota recolonization in middle-aged African turquoise killifish
summary: Animal study testing whether recolonization of middle-aged African turquoise killifish with young-donor gut microbiota affects lifespan, behavior, microbial diversity, and young-like bacterial community structure.
model_system: Middle-aged African turquoise killifish recolonized with gut bacteria from young donors
